message:
fix: CLI provider skipped as primary, getModel guard, stale docstring

1. llmWithFallback: CLI as primary provider was silently skipped because
   it wasn't in primaryUsesImplicitAuth. A user setting provider:"cli"
   with cliCommand:"/path/to/tool" would have their choice ignored since
   CLI has no API key and no env var to detect. Added "cli" to the
   implicit-auth providers alongside ollama and bedrock.

2. getModel: Added explicit "cli" guard that throws a clear error
   instead of falling through to getApiKey() which would try to use
   CASS_CLI_COMMAND as an API key string.

3. Fixed docstring that still said "as an argument" after changing to
   stdin piping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
